title: Commentary: Iran war shows how AI speeds up military ‘kill chains’
description: Artificial intelligence has enhanced the speed and scale of war, but this brings serious risks for civilians and military combatants, say academics.
content: NEWCASTLE, England: The US-Israel war on Iran has been described as “the first AI war”. But recent deployments of artificial intelligence are, in fact, the latest in a long history of technological developments that prize a need for speed in the mili... [5970 chars]

title: Micron boosted by AI-driven memory demand
description: The semiconductor manufacturer posted results that significantly beat expectations, fueled by the artificial intelligence boom. Demand for memory, essential for Nvidia chips, is driving spectacular...
content: Micron reported a sharp increase in quarterly performance, with adjusted EPS of $12.20, well above the $9.31 expected, with revenue of $23.86bn dollars compared to a consensus of $20.07bn. Year-on-year, revenue nearly tripled from $8.05bn in the same... [1078 chars]

title: An AI-rendered Val Kilmer will posthumously appear in a new film
description: By JAKE COYLE NEW YORK (AP) — A year after the actor’s death, a generative AI version of Val Kilmer will co-star in an independent film, in one of the boldest uses yet of artificial intelligence in moviemaking. title: China tech giant Tencent bets on AI agents
